_meta.source: Sponsor: Total Vise — Anne email 2026-06-07. Discount freedom2026, 10% off total order, 6/12–6/30/2026.
_meta.notes: Sponsor-post promo. PUBLIC — no tier term, no paywall, no gated_tier (the discount code must be visible to all). Portable/older block set. Product image 71442 used as both hero and in-body shot. Product copy drawn from totalvise.com product page.

blocks.tagline: A limited-time Looth Group offer on Total Vise's modular guitar repair workstation — June 12–30, 2026.

blocks.html: Total Vise builds modular workstations for guitar repair — and they’re giving the Looth Group community 10% off through the end of June. Their Proper’s Guitar Workstation Package with Quick Docking holds an instrument securely, face-up or face-down, so you can take on just about any repair on just about any instrument.

blocks.title: Your Looth Group discount
blocks.body:
Use code FREEDOM2026 at checkout for 10% off your total order at Total Vise.

Valid June 12–30, 2026.

blocks.alt: Proper's Guitar Workstation Package with Quick Docking Station from Total Vise.
blocks.image_text:
Proper's Guitar Workstation Package with Quick Docking Station.

The package pairs the Proper's Guitar Workstation with the Crossover Mini and a Quick Docking Station — letting you switch setups fast and work in nearly any position.

blocks.html: The workstation handles acoustics, electrics, and archtops, and accommodates mandolins, banjos, resonators, and electric basses. The modular design takes your own shop-made fixtures and cauls, so you can adapt it to whatever the bench throws at you — the setups are limited only by your imagination.

items.label: Proper's Guitar Workstation with Quick Docking
